action.reasoning: Observation: encoder_dim=512 model completely failed (0% exprate, train_loss=3.4 after 35 epochs). Previous encoder_dim=256 model got 7.84% after 10 epochs. Analysis: The 512-dim model never learned - possibly too large for the dataset or optimization issues. I have ~85 min left, enough for ~15 epochs of training (~72 min) plus eval (~8 min). Decision: Revert to encoder_dim=256, keep proven coverage attention setup, add label smoothing and gradient accumulation for stability, train 15 epochs, submit eval immediately.
